## Description
Clear description of the feature or enhancement.

## Problem it Solves
What problem does this feature address?

## Proposed Solution
How would you implement this?

-

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches considered and why they were rejected.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or other relevant information.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar suggestions
- [ ] I understand the proposed implementation approach
- [ ] This aligns with project goals
